title: Execution: Ratification of the Operating Agreement
actionTaken: Signed the Operating Agreement of OpenInnovate DAO LLC as sole Member and Human Executor. The Operating Agreement, effective March 24, 2026, establishes the complete governance framework for the Company including the Algorithmic Manager designation, Divergence Protocol, Constitutional Corpus governance, transparency obligations, and all other matters required by W.S. 17-31-106(c).
notes: First Governance Act of OpenInnovate DAO LLC. Entity filed with Wyoming Secretary of State (ref 2026-001929314) on 2026-03-24. EIN 41-5085693 obtained from IRS same day. Smart contract deployed on Base L2 at 0x3efDCccF7b141B5dA4B21478221B0bf0cfdF7536.
